name: Add expense operation
description: On the Operations tab, use the inline quick-add form at the top of the list (there is NO FAB). Keep the Expense segment selected, tap 4 5 . 5 0 on the calculator (45.50), tap the Groceries category chip, confirm the Checking account is selected, then tap the checkmark (✓) to save. Verify a new 45.50 Groceries expense appears at the top of the list.

name: Add income operation
description: On the Operations quick-add form, tap the Income segment, enter 500 on the calculator, tap the Salary category chip, keep the Checking account, tap the checkmark (✓). Verify the income appears in the list.

name: Edit existing operation
description: Tap an existing operation row in the list to open the edit modal. Wait ~1-2s for its fields (account, amount, category, labels) to populate, change the amount, tap Save. Verify the new amount is reflected in the list.

name: Delete operation
description: Tap an existing operation to open the edit modal, tap Delete, confirm. Verify it is removed from the list.

name: Operations list loads
description: Open the Operations tab. Verify the transaction list is not empty and shows entries with date separators and amounts.

name: Quick-add form
description: Use the quick-add form at the top of the Operations list. Enter 12.50 on the calculator, tap a category chip, tap the checkmark (✓). Verify the operation appears at the top of the list.

name: Search operations
description: Tap the Search bar at the top of the Operations tab. Type "Groceries". Verify only matching operations remain in the list.

name: Search with no results
description: Tap the Search bar on the Operations tab, type "xyzzy123". Verify an empty-state / no-results message appears rather than a crash.

name: Accounts list loads
description: Accounts is NOT a tab by default. Open the Settings tab, tap the "Accounts" row. Verify the Accounts screen shows Net Worth and at least one account with a name and balance.

name: Add account
description: Go to Settings → Accounts, tap the + FAB (bottom-right). Fill name "Test Account", balance 100.00, currency USD, save. Verify it appears in the account list.

name: Edit account
description: Go to Settings → Accounts, tap an existing account. Change the name, save. Verify the updated name appears in the list.

name: Transfer between accounts
description: On the Operations quick-add form, tap the Transfer segment, pick Checking as the source and Cash as the destination, enter 50.00, tap the checkmark (✓). Then open Settings → Accounts and verify both balances reflect the transfer.

name: Categories list loads
description: Categories is NOT a tab by default. Open the Settings tab, tap the "Categories" row. Verify the category grid is not empty (expense cards are neutral, income cards are green-tinted).

name: Add category
description: Go to Settings → Categories, tap the + FAB. Enter name "Test Category", select an icon, save. Verify it appears in the grid.

name: Category subcategories
description: Go to Settings → Categories. Tap a category card that shows a small folder icon in its top-right corner (e.g. Family). Verify a subcategory grid opens with a back breadcrumb at the top (e.g. "‹ Family"), then tap the breadcrumb to return to the top level.

name: Graphs screen loads
description: Tap the Graphs tab. Verify the Income/Expense summary cards and the Balance chart render without error.

name: Planned operations loads
description: Tap the Planned tab. Verify it loads without error. With no planned items it shows an empty state ("No planned operations yet.") plus a + FAB — that is a valid pass.

name: Add planned operation
description: On the Planned tab, tap the + FAB. Fill name "Monthly test", amount 100, select a category, save. Verify it appears in the planned list.

name: Back navigation from modals
description: Tap an operation row to open its edit modal, then press the Android back button. Verify the modal closes and the Operations list is still visible.

name: Balance updates after operation
description: Note the Checking balance on Settings → Accounts. On the Operations tab, add a 25.00 expense from Checking via the quick-add form. Return to Settings → Accounts. Verify the Checking balance decreased by 25.00.

name: Settings screen loads
description: Tap the Settings tab. Verify the list renders with Language, Hide balances, Theme, Accounts, Categories and Notification processing rows and does not crash.

name: Toggle light/dark theme
description: On the Settings tab, tap the Theme toggle. Verify the app switches between Light and Dark: the row subtitle flips (Light ↔ Dark) and the background/surface colors invert. Toggle it back.

name: Hide balances privacy toggle
description: On the Settings tab, toggle "Hide balances" on. Open Settings → Accounts (or the Operations account selector) and verify balances are masked. Toggle it back off.
